HomePage.title: Welcome, {address}
HomePage.description: Empowering cross-border financial inclusion through micro-loans backed by remittances.

activity.title: Recent Activity
activity.empty: No recent activity yet. Your transactions will appear here.

outreach.title: Community Outreach
outreach.description: New borrowers in Ghana are looking for micro-loans for agricultural tools. Help grow the ecosystem!

ActivityPage.title: Activity History
ActivityPage.description: View all your loan requests, remittances, and transactions in one place.
ActivityPage.connectWalletToViewActivity: Connect your wallet to view your activity history.
ActivityPage.emptyState: No activity yet. Your transactions will appear here.

Loans.title: Loans
Loans.description: Review active facilities, due dates, and repayment windows from one place.

empty.title: No loans found
empty.description: You do not have loans in this category yet.

Kingdom.title: Kingdom Dashboard
Kingdom.description: Track your progress, unlock achievements, and rise through the ranks

nft.title: Remittance NFT
nft.description: View the on-chain credit asset built from your remittance and repayment history.
nft.connectDescription: Your Remittance NFT appears here once your wallet is connected.
nft.error: Unable to load your Remittance NFT right now.
nft.emptyDescription: Send your first remittance to start building an on-chain credit asset.

Notifications.title: Notifications
Notifications.description: Review repayment reminders, score changes, loan updates, and alerts from one place.

empty.title: No notifications found
empty.description: New alerts and reminders will appear here.

Notifications.error: Unable to load notifications. Please try again.

AdminDisputes.title: Disputes
AdminDisputes.description: Review open default disputes and record the final resolution.

empty.title: No open disputes
empty.description: New borrower disputes will appear here as they are filed.

error.title: Unable to load disputes
error.description: Check your admin session and try again.

detail.title: Dispute #{id}
detail.error: This dispute could not be loaded.
detail.notePlaceholder: Explain why the default is being confirmed or reversed.

modal.confirmDescription: This keeps the loan in default and stores the resolution note.
modal.reverseDescription: This reverses the default outcome and stores the resolution note.

health.title: Loan health
health.unavailableDescription: Collateral and debt data are not available for this loan yet.
health.sourceDerived: Derived from collateral and total debt

descriptions.healthy: Collateral coverage is comfortably above the liquidation threshold.
descriptions.watch: Collateral coverage is close to the safety margin. Consider adding collateral.
descriptions.atRisk: This loan is at risk of liquidation. Add collateral to restore coverage.

refinance.title: Refinance loan
refinance.previewDescription: Preview of expected repayment schedule before signing.

Lend.cooldownActive: Withdraw available in about {minutes} minute(s) while cooldown is active.

Liquidations.title: Liquidatable Loans
Liquidations.description: Review active positions below the liquidation threshold and submit liquidation transactions.

walletRequired.title: Connect wallet
walletRequired.description: Connect a liquidator wallet before submitting liquidation transactions.

empty.title: No liquidatable loans
empty.description: Active loans are currently above the liquidation threshold.

error.title: Unable to load liquidations
error.description: Check the liquidations API and try again.
